{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Helgard quarters
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Helgard quarters]] are made of undressed stone or undecorated metal and contain patches of snow.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
